changelog: GAME CARD — logos now PUSHED TO LEFT/RIGHT EDGES with team names directly under them. The score box (or VS) takes the entire wide middle of the card. So a 'LIVE 98 — 102' game has all the room it needs while logos+names stay anchored to their corners. Achieved by switching the inner Row from weight(1f)/weight(1f) thirds to Arrangement.SpaceBetween with intrinsic-width side columns and a weight(1f) center.
Live scores bumped 30sp → 38sp now that the middle column is wide enough to hold them comfortably. Em-dash separator goes 22sp → 26sp.
Team-name font 10sp → 11sp for slightly easier readability — still narrow enough that 'GOLDEN KNIGHTS' / 'TIMBERWOLVES' fit without ellipsis (softWrap=false, overflow=Visible).
